response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrated experience in C++ at scale and has no clear evidence of 8 years of C++ programming or 5 years building large-scale cloud compute infrastructure as required; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal mention of distributed systems, cloud architecture, or technical leadership in cloud platforms.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Proven mentorship and workshop leadership in testing and engineering practices
Active open-source contributions and community engagement
concerns: No clear evidence of 8 years of C++ experience as required
Lacks documented experience with cloud compute platforms or large-scale distributed systems
No demonstrated technical leadership in cloud or DevOps engineering teams
